after_internship: Submit the Portfolio to the internship adviser
Answer the post-OJT student feedback form
Wait for final evaluation and grade computation

required_documents: Daily Attendance Report (DTR) duly signed by the Training Supervisor
Weekly Accomplishment Report, Progress Report, or Learning Diary
Evaluation Forms accomplished by the Employer or Training Supervisor
Evaluation Forms accomplished by the Student-Intern for the HTE and Training Supervisor
Photo Documentation of the Actual Training or Output
Certificate of Completion issued by the HTE
optional_documents: Certificates from networking and linkages participation such as local, national, or international webinars, trainings, or conferences
